task_completion.description: Product Name, SKU, Price, and Tax Class are entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the product creation form, the Product Name field contains 'Digital Watercolor Collection Vol. 1', SKU contains 'DWAC-VOL1', Price contains '14.99', and Tax Class is set to 'Taxable Goods'.
The 'Enable Product' toggle switch at the top of the product form is turned on (set to 'Yes').

task_completion.description: 'Links can be purchased separately' is enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Downloadable Information section, the checkbox for 'Links can be purchased separately' is checked.

task_completion.description: First download link is added with correct details
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Links section, there is a row with Title 'Full Collection (12 PNG Files)', Price '0.00', Max Downloads '5', and the URL option selected with 'https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf' entered.

task_completion.description: Second download link is added with correct details
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Links section, there is a row with Title 'Sample Pack (3 PNG Files)', Price '4.99', Max Downloads '3', and the URL option selected with 'https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf' entered.
A green success message stating 'You saved the product.' is visible at the top of the Magento admin page.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the Magento admin panel
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the Magento admin panel, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Magento interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Magento admin panel layout, and the browser address bar shows a valid local or remote URL for the Magento admin.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools being open to manipulate the DOM for a fake success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The product must be named 'Digital Watercolor Collection Vol. 1' with SKU 'DWAC-VOL1' and price $14.99. Tax class must be 'Taxable Goods'. 'Links can be purchased separately' must be enabled. Link 1: Title 'Full Collection (12 PNG Files)', Price $0.00, Max Downloads 5, URL 'https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf'. Link 2: Title 'Sample Pack (3 PNG Files)', Price $4.99, Max Downloads 3, URL 'https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf'.
